atot__farm_business_balance_sheet.name: Farm assets
atot__farm_business_balance_sheet.description: Total assets represents the survey respondents' estimated market value on December 31 of all capital assets owned by the farm operation.  For operations where the operator dwelling is considered part of the farm and located on the farm, the value of the dwelling is included.

actot__farm_business_balance_sheet.name: Assets: Current
actot__farm_business_balance_sheet.description: Current assets are those assets that will be realized in cash, sold or consumed in the production process within one year.

acliv__farm_business_balance_sheet.name: Assets: Livestock inventory
acliv__farm_business_balance_sheet.description: The market value of livestock and poultry on hand that are owned by the farm operation, excluding animals held for breeding purposes.  Animals that are owned for pleasure are not included.  Livestock or poultry that is owned by the operation, but being raised by another operation under a contract are included.

accrop__farm_business_balance_sheet.name: Assets: Crop inventory
accrop__farm_business_balance_sheet.description: The market value of all crops owned by the operation whether stored on or off the farm. Crops under Commodity Credit Corporation loans are not included; however, crops in storage which have been redeemed from CCC loan are included.

acinpt__farm_business_balance_sheet.name: Assets: Purchased inputs
acinpt__farm_business_balance_sheet.description: The value of unused supplies of purchased inputs such as seed, feed, chemicals, fuels, and fertilizers.

acgrow__farm_business_balance_sheet.name: Assets: Cash invested in growing crops
acgrow__farm_business_balance_sheet.description: Represents the amount of sunk costs for cover crops or crops not yet harvested.

acprpins__farm_business_balance_sheet.name: Assets: Prepaid insurance
acprpins__farm_business_balance_sheet.description: Outlays for insurance coverage made in the past that are not completely used up.

acothr__farm_business_balance_sheet.name: Assets: Other
acothr__farm_business_balance_sheet.description: The value of all stock in Federal Land Banks, Production Credit Associations, Agricultural Credit Associations, and other farm cooperatives; accounts receivable (including Government payments due); hedging account balances; certificates of deposit; checking and savings balances; and any other financial assets of the farm business.

antot__farm_business_balance_sheet.name: Assets: Non-current
antot__farm_business_balance_sheet.description: Non-current assets are comprised of working assets that support the production process and farm real estate.

aninvest__farm_business_balance_sheet.name: Assets: Investment in cooperatives
aninvest__farm_business_balance_sheet.description: Estimated market value of all stock in the Farm Credit System and other farm cooperatives.

anreale__farm_business_balance_sheet.name: Assets: Land and buildings
anreale__farm_business_balance_sheet.description: Estimated market value of all land and buildings owned by the farm operation.  Any other dwellings, such as those provided to hired labor, are also included if owned by the operation and located on the farm.

anequip__farm_business_balance_sheet.name: Assets: Farm equipment
anequip__farm_business_balance_sheet.description: Estimated market value of the farm share of trucks, cars, tractors, machinery, tools, equipment and implements owned by the operation.

anbreed__farm_business_balance_sheet.name: Assets: Breeding animals
anbreed__farm_business_balance_sheet.description: Estimated market value of all livestock animals held for breeding purposes.

dtot__farm_business_balance_sheet.name: Farm liabilities
dtot__farm_business_balance_sheet.description: Total liabilities are composed of any monetary obligations of the farm operation on December 31. The amount reported includes principal due and any unpaid interest.  Debts for nonfarm purposes, even if farm or ranch assets are used as collateral, are excluded.

lctot__farm_business_balance_sheet.name: Liabilities: Current
lctot__farm_business_balance_sheet.description: Current liabilities are the debts a farm business owes which must be paid within one year.

dshort__farm_business_balance_sheet.name: Liabilities: Notes payable within one year
dshort__farm_business_balance_sheet.description: The amount of loans outstanding on December 31 that are due for full repayment within one year.

lcterm__farm_business_balance_sheet.name: Liabilities: Current portion of term debt
lcterm__farm_business_balance_sheet.description: The current portion of long-term debt is the amount of principal that will be due within one year of the date of the balance sheet.

lcint__farm_business_balance_sheet.name: Liabilities: Accrued interest
lcint__farm_business_balance_sheet.description: Estimated as the amount of interest that has accumulated since the previous interest payment.

lcpay__farm_business_balance_sheet.name: Liabilities: Accounts payable
lcpay__farm_business_balance_sheet.description: The obligation that the farm business owes to its creditors for buying goods or services.   It is the unpaid invoices, bills, or statements for goods or services rendered by outside contractors, vendors or suppliers.

lntot__farm_business_balance_sheet.name: Liabilities: Noncurrent
lntot__farm_business_balance_sheet.description: Money owed by the farm business for a period one year or more in the future.

lnnreale__farm_business_balance_sheet.name: Liabilities: Non-real estate
lnnreale__farm_business_balance_sheet.description: The amount of debt owed by the farm business for non-real estate loans.

lnreale__farm_business_balance_sheet.name: Liabilities: Real estate
lnreale__farm_business_balance_sheet.description: The amount of debt owed by the farm business for real estate loans.

netw__farm_business_balance_sheet.name: Farm equity
netw__farm_business_balance_sheet.description: Total farm business assets minus farm business liabilities on December 31.
